parameters.query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gda_contacts (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, govtribe_id TEXT UNIQUE, name TEXT, email TEXT, phone TEXT, title TEXT, role TEXT, organization TEXT, agency TEXT, dept TEXT, linked_opp_ids TEXT[], notes TEXT, source TEXT DEFAULT 'GovTribe', last_interaction TIMESTAMPTZ, gap_days INTEGER, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW());
